title: AI Fact or Fiction: The Fable Ban, Tokenmaxxing, Saaspocolypse — With Ara Kharazian
summary: Ara Kharazian, lead economist at Ramp, joins a discussion examining whether AI spending by companies is producing real value. The episode fact-checks narratives about Anthropic's market position, tokenmaxing, the SaaS apocalypse, and evaluates which AI adoption trends are substantiated versus overstated.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz hosts Ara Kharazian, lead economist at Ramp, to fact-check prevailing narratives about corporate AI spending and whether it produces real value. The episode evaluates claims about Anthropic's market position, tokenmaxxing, and the so-called SaaS apocalypse, sorting which AI adoption trends are substantiated from those that are overstated. The framing matters because spending narratives often outrun the evidence, and Kharazian brings Ramp's vantage on actual company outlays to the assessment.
